text.message: Blue that was some serious will power not to play 843
If you trade me early a sheep and a brick for an ore
Otherwise I think I have to do 411 port
Oh sorry didn’t think me going there impacted you?
it just gives black a really good game
I figured you would prefer me on the port
I see my bad didn’t understand that’s what you meant
Ok red. Give me a non steal and I’ll road the other wY
For sure. We are back to even enemies now :)
But open to more diplomacy in the future
perhaps i am not the correct steal now
Didn’t really want to take road there but felt mandatory
black will win with his production i think
I’ll just build this road to nowhere.
